results.evidence: CreateSkillInline uses useConfig() for button label; ModelSelector uses updateConfig() which dispatches to shared context — both read from same ConfigResponse
ConfigContext.tsx:73-76 — updateConfig() awaits api.setConfig() then dispatches; no optimistic update
ModelSelector.tsx:27-28 — catch block calls refreshConfig(), context retains prior config; saving state managed locally
ConfigContext.tsx:71 — single useEffect calls refreshConfig() on mount; only call site for api.getConfig() in entire eval-ui
ConfigContextValue interface exports config, loading, updateConfig, refreshConfig; 10 components consume via useConfig()
ConfigContext.tsx:53 — throws 'useConfig must be used within ConfigProvider'
grep confirms zero api.getConfig() in components/ and pages/ — only in ConfigContext.tsx
SkillImprovePanel, AiEditBar, CreateSkillPage each have useEffect([config]) that initializes local selectedProvider/selectedModel from context while keeping local state independent
BenchmarkPage.tsx — all 3 api.getConfig() calls removed; model derived from globalConfig?.model via useConfig()
ConfigContext.tsx at src/eval-ui/src/ConfigContext.tsx — exports ConfigProvider + useConfig, uses createContext + useReducer
App.tsx — ConfigProvider wraps StudioProvider which wraps StudioLayout
